headline: Trump 🍊💥 Iran CEASEFIRE W 🫡 – Hormuz OPEN, Oil CRASHES 📉🛢️!
text:
DONALD J TRUMP 🍊🦅 dropping BOMBS 💣📱 on Truth Social at 18:32 DC time ⏰🇺🇸: 'US & Iran VERY FAR ALONG 🏃‍♂️💨 in DEFINITIVE PEACE DEAL ✌️🔥 – TWO-WEEK CEASEFIRE LOCKED IN 🛑⏳ to NEGOTIATE like BIG LEAGUE bosses!' Deadline was 20:00 EDT 🌅💥 or BOOM – MASSIVE STRIKES on Iranian OIL 🛢️🚀 & TRANSPORT INFRA 🚂💥, but COOLER HEADS 🧊😎 PREVAILED... for NOW 👀⏳! Iran SUSPENDS HOSTILITIES 🛡️❌ & FULLY OPENS STRAIT OF HORMUZ 🚢🌊 to COMMERCIAL SHIPPING 💰🛳️ – they still flex 'DOMINION' 👑🌊 but Trump SNAGGED his MAIN W 🏆📈!

Oil barrel PLUMMETS below $100 🛢️📉😩 FIRST TIME in DAYS, US STOCK FUTURES MOON 🚀🌙📊 – WALL STREET SIMPS 🤑🤡 POPPING CHAMPAGNE 🥂 cuz WORST IS OVER? 😤💨 Tuesday AM? Trump THREATENED IRAN CIV DEATH 💀🏛️ 'NEVER TO RETURN 🪦🔥!' Jaw-dropping AF 😱👅 – unlike ANY MODERN PREZ POTUS, shattering NORMS 🌍💥 like he does DOMESTIC DRAMA 🏠😂! Dems RAGING 🤬📢: Joaquin Castro X-posting 'Trump DECLINING 🧟‍♂️❌ NOT FIT TO LEAD!' Chuck Schumer 🕶️⚖️: 'GOP who DON'T END WAR OWNS THE CHAOS 🔥🍑!'

Even MAGA squad SPLITTING 😲🤼: Austin Scott 🇺🇸🔫 calls threats 'COUNTER-PRODUCTIVE 🤡🚫', Ron Johnson 🧔❄️ 'HUGE MISTAKE 💥❌ if bombs drop!', Nathaniel Moran TX cowboy 🤠 'NOT WHO WE ARE 🇺🇸❤️!', Lisa Murkowski AK ice queen 🧊👸 'NO EXCUSE for CIV-KILL THREAT 💀🚫!' White House COUNTERS 🏛️💪: 'LEVERAGE WORKED BITCHES 😤🔥 – MET & EXCEEDED MIL OBJs! 🎖️📈' Iran's military DEGRADED HARD 😵⚔️ – top mullahs FRAGGED 💥🕌 by US BOMBS, but NUC URANIUM 🤫☢️ status UNKNOWN, Houthis Yemen proxies STILL THIRSTY 🥤🏴‍☠️!

Iran FM Seyed Aragchi 🕌📜: 'HALT DEF OPS 🛑🛡️, SAFE HORMUZ PASS via OUR COORD 👮‍♂️🚢!' US OK'd their 10-POINT PLAN 📋🔟 – WITHDRAW TROOPS 🪖➡️🚪, LIFT SANCTIONS 💸✅, PAY WAR COMP 🤑💰, KEEP HORMUZ CONTROL 👑🌊! Trump agreeing? LMAO 😂🍆 NOPE – next 2 weeks GONNA BE BUMPY RIDE 🛤️😩 like Fast & Furious Tehran edition 🚀💥! Partial W for DONNIE 🥇🍊 – THREAT DROPPED, RESULT SNATCHED 👐🔥, but REPRIEVE NOT PERMA PEACE ✌️⏳. Long-term COST? World now SEES US as NORM-SHATTERING CHAOS DADDY 🌍🍆💦 – STABILITY? MORE LIKE STABBY-TIME 😈🗡️! Oil down, markets up 📈🤑, but Dems coping HARD 😭🤡 while Trump flexes 'I MADE THE DEAL ‼️🇺🇸' – STAY TUNED bbs 👀🍿!
